description: Offer cached inference to the exchange. Seller submits content (base64-encoded) and metadata. The exchange computes the content hash, buys at a discount, and responds with settle(put-accept) or settle(put-reject). Domain tags are composed as exchange:domain:<value> from the domain arg. v0.3 adds inline content (engine computes hash and size).

args.name: description
args.description: What the cached inference does — task description, inputs, outputs.

args.name: content
args.description: Base64-encoded cached inference content. The exchange computes SHA-256 hash and byte size from this field.

args.name: token_cost
args.description: Original inference cost in tokens (seller's claim).

args.name: content_type
args.description: Category of cached inference. Composed into exchange:content-type:<value> tag.

args.name: domain
args.description: Domain tags for discovery (e.g. 'go', 'terraform', 'security'). Each value composed into exchange:domain:<value> tag.

args.name: ttl_hours
args.description: Seller-requested time-to-live in hours. Exchange may override.

args.name: priority
args.description: Optional submission priority (1=highest, 10=lowest). Default: no preference.
